title: carpogymnia continentalis
intro: Carpogymnia continentalis, also known as the desert gold, is a flowering plant in the borage family native to southern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Carpogymnia continentalis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and aiding in wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used as an ingredient in topical creams and salves.
